title: RM-01 revoke false PASS
objective:
Run script:
"""
root = Path('governance')
queue_path = root / 'roadmap' / 'ACTIVE_QUEUE.json'
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'RM-01':
        task['status'] = 'IN_PROGRESS'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:31:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
matches = []
for p in root.rglob('*'):
    if p.is_file() and 'BEM1284_MINIMAL_GOVERNANCE_LOOP_GATE2' in p.name:
        matches.append(p)
modified = []
revocation = '\n\n## RM-01 FALSE PASS REVOCATION | 2026-06-04\nStatus: PASS_REVOKED\nReason: Claude audit found pre-KZ-1 blockers and ACTIVE_QUEUE mismatch; previous PASS is invalid until RM-01..RM-04 complete.\nRelease PASS: false\n'
for p in matches:
    text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
    if 'RM-01 FALSE PASS REVOCATION' not in text:
        text = text.replace('release_pass: true', 'release_pass: false')
        text = text.replace('Release PASS: true', 'Release PASS: false')
        text = text.replace('PASS: true', 'PASS: false')
        text = text.replace('✅ PASS', '❌ PASS_REVOKED')
        text = text.rstrip() + revocation + '\n'
        p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(p))
        modified.append(str(p))
state = root / 'state' / 'RM01_REVOKE_FALSE_PASS_BEM1284_GATE2.json'
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
status = 'completed' if modified else 'blocked'
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'RM-01','trace_id':'rm01_revoke_false_pass_bem1284_gate2','status':status,'release_pass':False,'target_pattern':'BEM1284_MINIMAL_GOVERNANCE_LOOP_GATE2','matches':[str(p) for p in matches],'modified':modified,'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'RM-01B record RM-01 result and activate RM-02' if modified else 'RM-01 repair target path'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = root / 'reports' / 'RM01_REVOKE_FALSE_PASS_BEM1284_GATE2.md'
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# RM-01 | Revoke false PASS from BEM1284 gate2\nStatus: ' + status + '\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\n## Target search\nPattern: BEM1284_MINIMAL_GOVERNANCE_LOOP_GATE2\nMatches: ' + json.dumps([str(p) for p in matches], ensure_ascii=False) + '\nModified: ' + json.dumps(modified, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n\n## Decision\nPrevious PASS is revoked until RM-01..RM-04 pre-KZ blockers are complete. Release PASS is false.\n\n## Workflow lock\nRespected. No `.github/workflows/*.yml` files touched.\n\n## Next\n' + ('RM-01B record RM-01 result and activate RM-02.' if modified else 'RM-01 repair target path.') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
